overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a vibrant summer meadow along a dirt trail, crossing a wooden bridge over a turquoise river, and pausing to admire distant mountain views before returning. The footage showcases the game's lush natural environments with bright midday lighting and vivid colors.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow dirt path through the meadow, surrounded by tall grass and colorful wildflowers

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path through the meadow
tall lush green grass lining both sides of the path
bright red poppies scattered throughout the grass
tall purple wildflowers mixed among the grass
large green oak and deciduous trees framing the meadow
ancient stone tower ruin visible in the distance
cluster of buildings visible on the horizon
low stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a lush summer meadow filled with tall grass and colorful wildflowers. The open landscape features scattered deciduous trees, a distant stone tower ruin, and a stone wall that appears alongside the path as he approaches a wooden bridge in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge over river with scenic mountain views

events.description: Geralt stops walking at the end of the bridge to look at the river and mountain scenery
Geralt turns around and begins walking back across the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt crosses the wooden bridge, pauses at the viewpoint to admire the turquoise river and distant rock formations, then turns and walks back the way he came

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with stone supports
wooden railings with vertical posts along the bridge sides
clear turquoise water flowing beneath the bridge
hazy blue mountain range visible across the river
tall pointed rock formations rising from the water
stone paved area at the bridge terminus with wooden railing

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a wooden footbridge over a turquoise river, with wooden railings lining the path. He stops at the stone platform at the bridge's end to admire the scenic view of distant mountains and rock spires rising from the water, then turns around to walk back across the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant summer meadow that leads to a scenic river crossing and a panoramic mountain vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through tall grass and colorful wildflowers, passing scattered deciduous trees and a distant stone tower ruin. As he continues, a stone wall appears alongside the path, guiding the movement toward a wooden footbridge in the distance. The scene then shifts as he crosses the bridge over a turquoise river, eventually coming to a halt on a stone platform to admire distant rock spires and mountains rising from the water. Finally, the camera follows as he turns around and retraces his steps back across the wooden bridge.
